title: Dream a Little Dream of Me
why_this_song: Dream a Little Dream of Me by Ella Fitzgerald (1968) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Dream a little dream of me
Just hold me tight and tell me you'll miss me
While I'm alone and blue as can be
Stars fading but I linger on dear
I'm longing to linger till dawn dear

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dream" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Stars fading but I linger on dear
Dream a little dream of me

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Dream a Little Dream of Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Dream a Little Dream of Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Dream a Little Dream of Me" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Dream a Little Dream of Me"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ella Fitzgerald one question about "Dream a Little Dream of Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ella Fitzgerald sobre "Dream a Little Dream of Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
